backupInfo:
• Backups are saved as .zip file
• Contains: All documents, settings and metadata
• Backups stay local on your device
• You can manually import backups on other devices
backupsDetailed: Your backups are stored locally on your device. You can manually export and import them.
chooseNextAction: What would you like to do next?
dataProtectionNote: All your data is stored locally on your device. No data is transmitted to third parties. For more information, please check your privacy settings.
deleteConfirmMessage: This action will permanently delete all scanned documents, settings and backups. Continue?
deleteDocumentConfirm: Do you really want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.
deleteImageConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
disclaimer: ⚠️ Disclaimer: This app is for demonstration purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. All data is stored locally on your device.
disclaimerContent1: The contents of this app have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
disclaimerContent2: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages according to § 7 para.1 TMG. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information.
gdprDescription: Your data belongs only to you
importConfirmMessage: Importing will replace all current data with the backup data. Continue?
impressumLawRef: Information provided according to § 5 Telemediengesetz (TMG) / applicable German law.
localStorageDescription: All data stays safely on your device
localStorageDetailed: All documents and data are stored exclusively on your device. No transfer to the cloud occurs.
markAsDoneConfirm: Mark this document as complete? Reminders will be cancelled.
notificationsDetailed: Reminders are processed locally on your device and are not forwarded to servers.
offlineFirstDetailed: The app works completely without an internet connection. Only when you want to share documents is a connection established.
pleaseCaptureOrSelectImages: Please capture or select images first
privacyConsent: By tapping 'Accept' you agree to our privacy policy. You can manage your data in settings at any time.
restoreConfirmMessage: Do you want to restore this backup? All current data will be replaced.
rightToAccessDescription: You can request an overview of all your stored data at any time.
rightToErasureDescription: You can permanently delete all your data from your device.
rightToPortabilityDescription: You can export your data as a backup and transfer it to other devices.
searchDescription: Enter a search term to find your documents
title: Title
tryDifferentSearch: Try searching with a different term
whatYouShouldHint: Fill out the extension form, attach a current bank statement, and submit it to the Jobcenter.
summary_unknown_document: This document could not be automatically categorized. Please review the content manually and select the appropriate category.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_summary: This letter means the Jobcenter is requesting additional documents or proofs because your file is not yet complete. Processing cannot continue until the required documents are received. If you do not send what is requested by the deadline, your application may be delayed, suspended, or decided negatively.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step1: Read the letter carefully and identify all required documents precisely.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step2: Find the submission deadline and save the date immediately.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step3: Prepare all required documents clearly and completely.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step4: Make sure the documents are current, correct, and not incomplete.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step5: Send the documents using the method mentioned in the letter, such as Jobcenter Portal, post, or email.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step6: Keep a copy of everything you sent as proof.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_summary: An appointment has been scheduled for you at the Jobcenter to review your situation, discuss your application, or verify some information. This appointment is an essential part of your file follow-up. Missing or being late without prior notice may be considered non-cooperation and could cause problems with your case or even affect your benefits.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_step1: Record the appointment in your calendar immediately.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_step2: Read the reason for the appointment and what is expected of you.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_step3: Prepare all documents mentioned in the invitation.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_step4: Arrive a little early and at the correct location.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_step5: If you cannot attend, contact them in advance and request a reschedule.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_step6: Keep the invitation letter with you on the day of the appointment.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_telefontermin_su: The Jobcenter has scheduled a telephone appointment with you. They will call you at the stated time using the number they have on file. You may need to send documents in advance. The next steps will be discussed at the end of the call.
cat_jobcenter_einladung_telefontermin_st: Note the date and time of the call immediately in your calendar.
Make sure the phone number the Jobcenter has on file is correct and available at the time of the appointment.
Check whether the letter asks you to send documents beforehand and submit them within the deadline.
Keep the letter and any related documents ready before the call begins.
Be available by phone at the specified time – the call may last up to 60 minutes.
After the call, note down what was agreed regarding the next steps.
cat_jobcenter_einkommensbescheinigung_su: This form is used to obtain official information about your income from your employer, as the Jobcenter does not rely solely on personal declarations. The data directly affects the calculation of your benefit amount. If the form is not completed, signed by your employer, and submitted, processing may be delayed or support may be calculated incorrectly.
cat_jobcenter_einkommensbescheinigung_st: Hand the form to your employer or the payroll department.
Make sure all salary and employment data is filled in completely.
Check for the signature and stamp if required.
Make a copy of the form after it is completed.
Send it to the Jobcenter using the method mentioned.
Keep a copy for later reference.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_summa: This form is used to officially confirm current or past employment details from your employer. It is usually requested to clarify the duration of employment, how the employment relationship ended, or details that affect entitlement. If it is not submitted, a decision may be delayed or the file may remain incomplete.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step1: Give the form to your employer or the responsible department.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step2: Make sure the start and end dates of employment are filled in accurately.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step3: Check the reason for termination if required.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step4: Make sure the relevant party has signed the form.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step5: Send the form to the Jobcenter promptly.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step6: Keep a clear copy of it.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_summary: This is the main application for receiving Bürgergeld. It contains all key information about you and your financial, housing, and family situation. The primary decision is based on this form and the accuracy of the data it contains. Incomplete or incorrect data may delay the file, lead to rejection, or result in requests for additional documents.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_step1: Fill in all basic information accurately.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_step2: Do not leave important fields empty.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_step3: Attach the required documents with the application.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_step6: Keep a complete copy of the application.
cat_jobcenter_wba_summary: This form is used to renew your support before the current approval period ends, as the Jobcenter does not renew benefits automatically. If the renewal application is not submitted in time, payments may stop and support will not continue for the next period. This form is therefore very important as your Bewilligungszeitraum approaches its end.
cat_jobcenter_wba_step1: Fill in the WBA form completely.
cat_jobcenter_wba_step2: Check whether any documents need to be attached with the application.
cat_jobcenter_wba_step3: Make sure the form is signed and all essential fields are completed.
cat_jobcenter_wba_step4: Submit the application before the end of the current approval period.
cat_jobcenter_wba_step5: Keep a copy of the application and submission proof.
cat_jobcenter_wba_step6: Follow up later if you have not received a response.
cat_jobcenter_vaem_summary: This form is used to notify the Jobcenter of any change in your circumstances, such as housing, employment, income, or the number of people in your household. These changes can directly affect the amount of support or the entitlement itself. If they are not reported in time, the Jobcenter may ask you to repay money later, or administrative or legal issues may arise.
cat_jobcenter_vaem_step1: Identify exactly what change has occurred.
cat_jobcenter_vaem_step2: Fill in the VÄM form clearly and accurately.
cat_jobcenter_vaem_step3: Attach any supporting evidence for the change.
cat_jobcenter_vaem_step4: Send the form as soon as possible.
cat_jobcenter_vaem_step6: Follow up if the change requires an additional response from the Jobcenter.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_summary: This form is used to record all your income sources, as the Jobcenter relies on it to calculate the correct benefit amount. Any income that is not mentioned or is incompletely stated may lead to an incorrect calculation or future issues. It must therefore be filled in accurately with supporting documentation attached when needed.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_step1: List all income sources without exception.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_step2: Distinguish between regular and irregular income if necessary.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_step4: Review the figures carefully before submitting.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_step5: Submit the form with the application or when requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_step6: Keep a clear copy of it.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_summary: This form covers information about housing, heating, and associated costs, as this data affects how much support can be covered. If the information is not submitted correctly, rent or heating costs may not be calculated as they should be. The contract details and costs must therefore be clear and complete.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step1: Fill in all housing details completely.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step2: Enter the base rent, ancillary costs, and heating separately if required.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step3: Attach the rental agreement or proof of costs.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step4: Make sure the figures match the official documents.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step5: Submit the form with the application or when requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_summary: This form is used to record the money and assets you own, as the Jobcenter needs this information to properly assess your entitlement. If assets are not declared or inaccurate information is entered, the application may be rejected or you may be asked to repay amounts later. It must therefore be filled in honestly and completely.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_step1: List all relevant assets and accounts.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_step2: Do not omit any significant financial assets.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_step3: Attach proof of balances or ownership if requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_step4: Make sure the information is up to date.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_step5: Submit the form with the required documents.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_summary: This form is for people who are self-employed or freelance, as their income cannot be estimated automatically like a regular salary. It records revenue, expenses, and an estimate of profit or actual income. If it is not submitted, support may be stopped or calculated inaccurately.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_step1: Fill in revenue and expenses accurately.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_step2: Distinguish between estimated and final figures if required.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_step3: Attach the required proofs or records.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_step4: Make sure the entered time period is correct.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_step5: Submit the form at the required time.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_step6: Keep a copy of all figures and attachments.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_summary: This form is used when there is another adult in the Bedarfsgemeinschaft whose data must be entered separately. The presence of this person may affect the entitlement calculation and how the family or household's financial situation is assessed. If the information is not entered correctly, the final support calculation may be inaccurate.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step1: Fill in the additional person's details completely.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step2: Verify the accuracy of the civil status and basic data.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step3: Attach any required documents relating to this person.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step4: Review the relationship between this person and the applicant.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step5: Submit the form with the main file if requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step6: Keep a clear copy of it.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_summary: This form is used to enter children's data into the case, as the presence of children affects the entitlement and the benefit amount. Failing to enter children's data correctly may lead to insufficient support or delayed processing. All information related to the child must therefore be entered clearly.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_step1: Enter each child's data separately if required.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_step2: Verify the accuracy of the basic information.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_step3: Attach the required documents relating to the children.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_step4: Review the topic of custody or Kindergeld if relevant.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_step5: Submit the form with the main file.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_summary: This form is used when there are other people living with you in the same household who are not necessarily part of the Bedarfsgemeinschaft. The Jobcenter needs this information to understand the general living and financial situation within the household. Incomplete or inaccurate information may affect the entitlement calculation.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_step1: Enter the details of the people living with you.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_step2: Clearly specify the relationship between them and you.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_step3: Do not confuse Haushaltsgemeinschaft with Bedarfsgemeinschaft.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_step4: Attach proof of the situation if requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_step5: Submit the form with the application or when requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_summary: This form is used to determine whether you live with a partner in a relationship that affects your benefit assessment. The Jobcenter checks here whether the relationship qualifies as a Verantwortungs- und Einstehensgemeinschaft, as that changes the method of calculation. Incorrect information may cause problems with the entitlement or the final decision.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_step1: Read the questions carefully before answering.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_step2: Answer clearly and correctly without contradiction.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_step3: Pay attention to questions about shared housing and financial responsibility.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_step4: Attach proof of the situation if requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_step5: Submit the form with the application or when requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_step6: Keep a copy of the answers.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_summary: This form covers health and social insurance data, which is important to ensure continued coverage while receiving support. If this information is not entered correctly, problems may arise with insurance status, contribution transfers, or file processing. It must therefore be filled in accurately, especially regarding the Krankenkasse name and insurance number.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_step1: Enter current health insurance information accurately.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_step2: Verify the name of the provider and the insurance number if available.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_step3: Specify whether you are covered by statutory or private insurance.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_step4: Attach proof of insurance if requested.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_step5: Submit the form with the relevant documents.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh1_summary: This form covers maintenance claims arising from separation, divorce, or dissolution of a civil partnership. It asks about the family situation and whether you are permanently separated.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh1_step1: Clarify whether your situation involves separation, divorce, or dissolution of a civil partnership.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh1_step2: Enter the personal data of the person concerned within the benefit unit.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh1_step4: State whether a divorce or dissolution application has been filed.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh1_step5: Attach any evidence relating to the separation or divorce if required.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh1_step6: Keep a copy of the completed form.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_label: Annex UH2 – Maintenance due to Pregnancy
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_summary: This form applies to maintenance claims arising from a pregnancy. It asks about the pregnant person, the expected due date, and the details of the child's father.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_step1: Confirm that the situation actually involves a pregnancy.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_step2: Enter the details of the pregnant person correctly.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_step3: State the expected due date accurately.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_step4: Provide the father's details as required, or indicate if he is unknown or deceased.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_step5: Attach any relevant supporting documents if required.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_step6: Keep a copy of the completed form.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_summary: This form is used to assess child maintenance for persons under 25 who have a maintenance claim against at least one parent living outside the benefit unit.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_step1: Confirm this concerns child maintenance – not separation maintenance or pregnancy maintenance.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_step2: Enter the details of the person entitled to maintenance.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_step3: Complete the information about the parents fully.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_step4: State whether a parent is known, unknown, or deceased.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_step5: Attach any relevant supporting documents if required.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_step6: Keep a copy of the completed form.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_bb_summary: This form is used when you have a special situation that leads to an extraordinary additional need, for which you may be entitled to extra support. If this application is not submitted with a clear explanation of the situation, the need may not be considered at all. The application must therefore be supported with proof and a clear explanation of the special circumstances.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_bb_step2: Explain why the need is additional and not ordinary.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_bb_step4: Check whether the situation is ongoing or temporary.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_bb_step5: Submit the form with the attachments.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_bb_step6: Keep a copy of the application and the proofs.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_meb_summary: This form is used when you have an additional need related to a health condition or medical reason that leads to higher-than-normal costs. Without this form and appropriate medical proof, this type of additional support will generally not be calculated. It must therefore be filled in accurately with the required medical report or proof attached.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_meb_step2: Attach the required medical report or certificate.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_meb_step3: Make sure the health reason is stated sufficiently.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_meb_step4: Check whether the condition is temporary or ongoing.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_meb_step5: Submit the form with the remaining documents.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_meb_step6: Keep a complete copy of it.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uf_summary: This form is used when there is compensation or a financial claim related to an accident, damage, or a third party responsible for payment. This information is important because any financial compensation may affect the entitlement assessment or benefit calculation. If not declared correctly, calculations may be wrong or future claims may arise.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uf_step1: Enter the details of the accident or compensation accurately.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uf_step2: Name the party responsible for payment if applicable.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uf_step3: Attach available proofs, correspondence, or decisions.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uf_step4: Clarify whether payments have started or are still expected.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uf_step5: Submit the form with the file or when requested.
cat_jobcenter_hinweise_summary: This page or letter usually contains general instructions or clarifications and does not require direct action on its own. Its purpose is to help you understand the application, how to fill in the forms, or some rights and obligations related to the process. Although it is generally not an independent action step, reading it is important to avoid mistakes during completion or submission.
cat_jobcenter_hinweise_step1: Read the information calmly and completely.
cat_jobcenter_hinweise_step2: Focus on the instructions related to completion or submission.
cat_jobcenter_hinweise_step3: Refer back to it when filling in other forms.
cat_jobcenter_hinweise_step6: If a clear deadline appears inside, treat it as an important action.
cat_auslaender_terminbestaetigung_summar: This letter confirms a personal appointment at the immigration authority. The appointment may be for identity verification, submission of original documents, signing forms, file review, or document collection. Missing the appointment without prior notice may delay processing or require rebooking.
cat_auslaender_terminbestaetigung_step1: Note the date and time immediately and add it to your calendar.
cat_auslaender_terminbestaetigung_step2: Set a reminder one day before and at least two hours before.
cat_auslaender_terminbestaetigung_step3: Prepare your passport, current residence permit, the letter itself, and any documents mentioned.
cat_auslaender_terminbestaetigung_step4: Check the location: counter / room / address if stated.
cat_auslaender_terminbestaetigung_step5: If you cannot attend, contact them early to cancel or reschedule.
cat_auslaender_terminbestaetigung_step6: After the appointment, check whether further steps such as card issuance or decision are pending.
cat_auslaender_termineinladung_online_la: Written Appointment Invitation After Online Application
cat_auslaender_termineinladung_online_su: This letter means your online application has entered active processing and the authority now requires your personal attendance. This is typically to sign the form, verify originals, or complete a final step. It is a positive sign but not a final approval. Failing to appear may stall the process despite your prior online submission.
cat_auslaender_termineinladung_online_st: Extract the appointment date and time and record them immediately.
Prepare your passport, original documents, and any form that needs signing.
Do not rely only on digital copies; originals are usually required here.
Bring the invitation letter in case it is requested at entry.
Treat the appointment as a completion step, not a general enquiry.
After the appointment, check whether further documents or steps follow.
cat_auslaender_terminverlegung_summary: This letter reschedules or cancels an existing appointment and replaces it with a new one. The core risk is continuing to rely on the old date after receiving this letter, which could result in appearing on the wrong day or missing the actual appointment.
cat_auslaender_terminverlegung_step1: Mark the old appointment as cancelled or delete it from your calendar immediately.
cat_auslaender_terminverlegung_step2: Extract the new appointment in full: date, time, and location.
cat_auslaender_terminverlegung_step4: Do not change the document list unless the letter explicitly states otherwise.
cat_auslaender_terminverlegung_step5: If there are two dates in the letter, use the one linked to new appointment / changed appointment / instead.
cat_auslaender_terminverlegung_step6: Check whether the required documents have changed due to the appointment change.
cat_auslaender_unterlagen_anfordering_su: This is one of the most important letters from the immigration authority: the file is incomplete and a decision depends on receiving specific documents. It is usually very concrete with a list of missing items and sometimes a deadline and submission method. Failure to submit may stall, delay, or result in rejection of the application.
cat_auslaender_unterlagen_anfordering_st: Extract each required document item individually.
Match each item to an existing copy or an action needed to obtain it.
If a deadline is stated, classify the letter as high priority.
Send documents only via the method stated in the letter: Portal / Upload / E-Mail / Post.
Keep a proof of submission, screenshot, or PDF copy of what you sent.
Link this letter to the related application or transaction in the same file.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_summary: This letter is more specific than a document request: it explicitly states that the application itself is incomplete. The file exists at the authority but cannot be processed further because key data or documents are missing. Unlike a general information request, this is more serious because processing is genuinely blocked, not just queued.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step1: Consider the application unprocessable until the missing items are submitted.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step2: Identify precisely what is missing: document, information, signature, or form.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step3: Close all gaps in the file as quickly as possible, especially if a deadline applies.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step4: Submit only via the method specified in the letter.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step5: Do not treat the application as 'waiting'; treat it as 'blocked due to missing items'.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step6: Keep a copy of the original application and subsequently submitted documents.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerung_hinweis_sum: This letter is neither an appointment nor a final decision, but an important early warning that your current residence permit is expiring soon and action must be taken before it lapses. It may seem like mere information, but it is actually a signal to begin renewal preparations immediately. Waiting too long can lead to time pressure or legal issues regarding residence or employment.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerung_hinweis_ste: Extract the exact expiry date of the current permit.
Immediately start gathering renewal documents: passport, address, health insurance, purpose of stay.
Check whether the city accepts online submission or requires a form or later appointment.
Do not wait until the last day.
Set a reminder well before expiry, not just two days beforehand.
Watch for later messages regarding an appointment or additional documents.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerungsantrag_labe: Application for Renewal of Residence Permit
cat_auslaender_verlaengerungsantrag_summ: This transaction concerns the submission of the renewal application itself, not the decision or collection. If this step is done incorrectly or incompletely, the file may not actually start or may remain incomplete from the very first step.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerungsantrag_step: Classify as a formal renewal process, not an information letter.
Prepare all required documents before starting the upload.
Upload files only in the accepted format if submitting electronically.
Review the application before sending to ensure all fields and attachments are complete.
Keep a copy of the application, submission confirmation, and all uploaded files.
Follow up later if you have not received a response.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerung_vorsprache_: This letter describes a two-stage process: first submitting the application or uploading documents, then a later personal appointment after review. The key is not to confuse 'submit now' with 'you have an appointment'. If no specific appointment is mentioned, none should be created in the system.
Submit the application first; do not wait for an appointment invitation before starting.
Upload or send documents as instructed.
Understand that personal attendance may come later via a separate letter.
Do not create a calendar entry unless an actual date and time are given.
Classify as 'renewal + later invitation', not 'confirmed appointment'.
After the appointment, check whether further steps such as card issuance or decision are pending.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_summary: This letter does not necessarily request new documents but specifies the correct upload method within the electronic system. Its value lies in the submission mechanism: accepted formats, file size, and upload location. A common error is sending documents via a different channel or in an unaccepted format, leaving the application incomplete even though the documents are ready.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step1: Upload files within the form itself if the letter requests this.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step2: Check accepted formats: PDF, JPEG, or PNG.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step3: Review file readability before uploading, especially passport, contracts, and proofs.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step4: Observe individual and total file size limits if stated in the letter.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step5: Do not switch submission channels unless the letter explicitly permits it.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step6: Note any deadline associated with the upload.
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_label: Application for Issuance of Residence Permit
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_summary: This transaction concerns applying for a new residence permit, not renewing an existing one. It is the starting point for a new file requiring a complete form and core documents linked to the purpose of stay. Any gap here affects the file from the very beginning.
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_step1: Complete the application fully and clearly.
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_step2: Gather all core documents linked to the intended purpose of stay.
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_step3: Attach passport, biometric photo, health insurance, and proof of housing if required.
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_step4: Submit via the correct channel stated in the letter or by the city.
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_step5: Do not consider the process complete if only the form was submitted without attachments.
cat_auslaender_erteilung_antrag_step6: Keep a copy of the application and attachments.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_summary: This transaction is a first-time application, not a renewal or change. The core documents – passport, biometric photo, purpose of stay, and sometimes entry status – form the basis of the entire file. Because it is an initial application, any gap affects the whole file, not just a sub-step.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step1: Classify as a new first-time application.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step2: Prepare a clear copy of the passport and all relevant entry pages.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step3: Obtain a current biometric photo and proof of purpose of stay.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step4: Ensure all core attachments are included from the start.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step5: Do not begin with a half-complete file and wait for follow-up requests.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step6: Keep a copy of the first complete application with all attachments.
cat_auslaender_formularhinweis_summary: This letter makes clear that the form of the application itself matters, not just the content of the documents. Sometimes a person has all required documents but the application is considered incomplete or invalid because it was not submitted on the official form, mandatory fields are missing, or the signature is absent. This letter prevents formal errors that seem minor but can halt the entire process.
cat_auslaender_formularhinweis_step1: Use only the specified official form.
cat_auslaender_formularhinweis_step2: Complete all required fields carefully and leave no mandatory fields blank.
cat_auslaender_formularhinweis_step3: Attach required annexes to the form itself.
cat_auslaender_formularhinweis_step4: Check signature and date if required at the end of the form.
cat_auslaender_formularhinweis_step5: Do not submit free text instead of the official form if the letter names a mandatory form.
cat_auslaender_formularhinweis_step6: Use as a reference when preparing other forms.
cat_auslaender_zustimmung_summary: This is an approval or consent letter and is one of the positive messages. However, it is not always the end of the process; it may contain an expiry date, a next step, or a reference to collection or card issuance. The risk is not rejection but rather reading only the word 'approval' without reading the rest.
cat_auslaender_zustimmung_step1: Save the letter as a key document in the file.
cat_auslaender_zustimmung_step2: Extract the expiry date or start of validity if present.
cat_auslaender_zustimmung_step3: Set a reminder before the expiry date.
cat_auslaender_zustimmung_step4: Check whether a next step is required such as collection, fee payment, or further review.
cat_auslaender_zustimmung_step5: Keep a clear PDF copy as the letter may serve as important proof later.
cat_auslaender_zustimmung_step6: Check whether the approval is linked to employment or a specific residence permit type.
cat_auslaender_bewilligungsbescheid_summ: This letter is an approval with conditions or restrictions. The application has been accepted in principle, but there are Nebenbestimmungen or Auflagen that must be understood precisely, such as restrictions on employment, place of residence, or type of activity. The risk is that users may read only the word 'approval' and ignore the attached conditions that are part of the decision itself.
cat_auslaender_bewilligungsbescheid_step: Treat the letter as an approval but read all conditions in full before drawing conclusions.
Extract restrictions or conditions item by item.
Link the decision and conditions within the same file and do not separate them.
Pay particular attention to any restriction relating to employment, place of residence, or type of activity.
Keep a clear copy of the complete decision with all pages.
If a condition is unclear, do not ignore it – ask the authority.
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_label: Electronic Residence Permit – Ready for Collection
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_summary: This letter indicates that the processing phase has usually concluded and the electronic residence card is ready for collection. It is not a new document request or submission phase but a final or near-final collection step. A common error is interpreting it as a call to restart the process when all that is needed is collection as instructed.
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_step1: Classify as a collection phase, not a processing phase.
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_step2: Check whether an appointment is required for collection.
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_step3: Prepare your passport, collection slip, or any identity document mentioned in the letter.
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_step4: Bring the letter when you visit in case it is required as proof.
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_step5: Do not confuse it with an invitation to submit documents or attend a new interview.
cat_auslaender_eat_abholung_step6: After collection, immediately verify the correctness of the card data.
cat_auslaender_dokumentenausgabebox_labe: Document Dispenser / eAT Collection Without Appointment
cat_auslaender_dokumentenausgabebox_summ: This letter clearly states that collection takes place without an appointment, often via a document dispenser or direct delivery system. This changes the entire logic: no new invitation to wait for, no regular appointment to book. The key is to follow the collection instructions precisely: time, location, identity proof, and possibly a power of attorney if someone else is collecting.
cat_auslaender_dokumentenausgabebox_step: Read the collection steps exactly as stated in the letter.
Check whether a code, notification, or power of attorney is required.
Prepare your passport or required identity document.
Do not create a calendar appointment if the letter confirms collection without an appointment.
Carry out collection only via the specified method.
Note the operating hours of the dispenser or device.
cat_auslaender_beschaeftigung_summary: This transaction relates to a regular employment residence permit. The purpose of stay is directly tied to the job, so the key documents reflect the employment relationship: work contract, employer details, possibly an employment declaration form, plus passport, insurance, and housing. Any gap here affects not just one document but the entire basis of the residence application.
cat_auslaender_beschaeftigung_step1: Classify as a regular employment residence permit.
cat_auslaender_beschaeftigung_step2: Prepare the work contract or binding job offer.
cat_auslaender_beschaeftigung_step3: Attach proof of income or salary if stated.
cat_auslaender_beschaeftigung_step4: Prepare housing and health insurance documents alongside employment documents.
cat_auslaender_beschaeftigung_step5: Ensure all employer documents are clear, up to date, and signed if required.
cat_auslaender_beschaeftigung_step6: Compile all employment documents in one file.
cat_auslaender_erklaerung_beschaeftigung: This letter concerns a specific form that formally evidences details of the employment relationship. In many cases it must be completed, finalized, or signed by the employer. The form matters because it does not only prove the existence of a job but gives the authority a precise picture of the type of work, hours, salary, and start date.
Extract the name of the form clearly and confirm it is indeed the one required.
Contact the employer if they need to complete or sign part of it.
Attach the form along with the work contract if the letter requests this.
Do not submit only the work contract if the letter specifically names this form.
Check the signature, stamp if required, and the stated employment start date.
Keep in the same employment file.
cat_auslaender_arbeitsplatzangebot_summa: This letter clarifies that a binding job offer may be sufficient temporarily, even if the final contract has not yet been signed. This is important because many users assume the process will completely stall without a final contract. The offer must be clear and binding and contain the key details.
cat_auslaender_arbeitsplatzangebot_step1: Check whether you have a binding and clear job offer, not just general correspondence.
cat_auslaender_arbeitsplatzangebot_step2: Ensure the offer contains the job title, salary, start date, and employer details.
cat_auslaender_arbeitsplatzangebot_step3: Use it instead of the contract if the letter explicitly permits this.
cat_auslaender_arbeitsplatzangebot_step4: Submit via the method specified in the transaction.
cat_auslaender_arbeitsplatzangebot_step5: Do not delay the file only because the final contract is not yet ready if the accepted offer is available.
cat_auslaender_arbeitsplatzangebot_step6: If the final contract becomes available later, add it to the same file.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_summary: This transaction concerns the EU Blue Card, not a regular employment permit. It is a separate process typically linked to an academic degree, a minimum salary, a work contract or binding offer, and sometimes approval from the Federal Employment Agency. The focus is on the type of job, salary, and qualification – not just the existence of a contract.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step1: Classify as an EU Blue Card, not a regular employment residence permit.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step2: Prepare your passport and biometric photo.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step3: Attach the work contract or binding offer if stated.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step4: Check for mention of an academic degree or approval from a competent authority.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step6: Compile professional and academic documents together.
cat_auslaender_niederlassungserlaubnis_b: Permanent Settlement Permit for EU Blue Card Holders

This letter concerns not a regular renewal but the transition to an unlimited settlement permit for EU Blue Card holders when the conditions are met. This means a legal upgrade in residence status, not a temporary continuation. Conditions typically relate to length of stay, language proficiency, and employment.
Classify as a settlement permit, not a routine renewal.
Link to the current Blue Card status and duration of holding.
Check for conditions such as 21/27 months or B1 language level.
Prepare documents proving fulfilment of these conditions if mentioned.
Do not treat as a study or regular employment letter.
If permanent residence is not explicitly mentioned, do not classify here.
cat_auslaender_studium_summary: This transaction concerns an academic study residence permit. The focus is usually on proving university enrolment, not just general identity. Key documents are typically proof of enrolment, health insurance, and proof of financial means such as a blocked account. The absence of any of these elements can jeopardise the application from the start.
cat_auslaender_studium_step1: Classify as an academic study residence permit.
cat_auslaender_studium_step2: Prepare current proof of enrolment or university admission.
cat_auslaender_studium_step3: Attach health insurance and proof of financing or living costs if required.
cat_auslaender_studium_step4: Ensure study documents are current and not from a past semester.
cat_auslaender_studium_step5: Submit all proofs together where possible to avoid an incomplete file.
cat_auslaender_studium_step6: Keep track of validity period and continuation requirements.
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_label: Residence Permit for Vocational Training / Further Education
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_summary: This category concerns vocational training or further education, not academic study. The central document is usually the training contract or proof of the vocational programme. Confusing it with a study permit is risky because the proof logic is different. An unclear or missing training contract makes the file vulnerable from the outset.
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_step1: Classify as vocational training or further education, not academic study.
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_step2: Prepare the training contract or programme proof clearly.
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_step3: Attach passport, health insurance, and any training institution-specific documents.
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_step4: Ensure the contract is current and shows start date and duration.
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_step5: Check whether additional documents from the school or training company are required.
cat_auslaender_ausbildung_step6: Keep the complete training file together.
cat_auslaender_nachweisblatt_studium_sum: This is not a standalone residence permit but a supplementary study evidence file within a study case. Its function is usually to prove continuation of study, academic progress, or current enrolment validity. It may seem minor but can actually determine whether a study file is considered complete or incomplete.
cat_auslaender_nachweisblatt_studium_ste: Attach the specific study proof requested, not just any general document.
Add proof of enrolment, academic results, or performance overview if stated.
Ensure documents are current and relate to the current or required semester.
Keep a copy of all study proofs submitted.
Do not consider the study file complete if this annex was requested but not yet submitted.
Review each item before final submission.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_summary: This category covers general family reunification, usually for spouses or children. The decisive element is not only identity but proof of the family relationship alongside adequate housing and basic documents. Any weakness in relationship proof or family documents directly impacts the entire file.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step1: Classify as a family reunification file.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step2: Prepare suitable proof of the family relationship: marriage certificate, birth certificate, or similar.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step3: Attach housing proof and basic documents such as passport and photos if required.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step4: Check clarity of all family documents and consistency of names and dates within them.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step5: Do not leave the family relationship proof incomplete and rely on a later supplement.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step6: Watch for any requirements concerning the person already in Germany.
cat_auslaender_nachzug_deutsche_summary: This category is a specific form of family reunification where the reference person is a German national. It should be distinguished from general family reunification and EU citizen family reunification as the legal basis is different even if some documents are similar. Precision in classification here is important to avoid confusion with other family categories.
cat_auslaender_nachzug_deutsche_step1: Classify as family reunification for German nationals.
cat_auslaender_nachzug_deutsche_step2: Complete the required form and attach the necessary family documents.
cat_auslaender_nachzug_deutsche_step3: Highlight the status as a relative of German nationality if stated.
cat_auslaender_nachzug_deutsche_step4: Do not confuse with general family reunification or EU family members.
cat_auslaender_nachzug_deutsche_step5: Review the application completely before submitting as the legal category here is precise.
cat_auslaender_nachzug_deutsche_step6: If "deutsch" does not appear clearly, do not classify here.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_label: Residence Card for Family Members of EU Citizens
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_summa: This category applies to family members of EU citizens and usually revolves around the residence card in the context of freedom of movement. The name of the form and the Freizügigkeit category are very helpful in distinguishing it here. It should not be merged with reunification for German nationals or general family reunification as the legal basis is different.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_step1: Classify as a residence card for family members of an EU citizen.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_step2: Prepare the specific form required for this category.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_step3: Attach passport, photo, and proof of family relationship.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_step4: Check for any reference to Freizügigkeit or Unionsbürger in the letter.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_step5: Do not classify as an employment or study permit just because general documents look similar.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltskarte_eu_step6: Keep everything proving cohabitation with the EU person in one file.
cat_auslaender_eingangsbestaetigung_summ: This letter confirms receipt of the online application and may contain important text stating that the current residence permit temporarily continues until a decision is made. It is neither a final approval nor a standalone Fiktionsbescheinigung. It is a transitional document that should be saved and used within its actual limits.
cat_auslaender_eingangsbestaetigung_step: Save the letter or confirmation as a PDF immediately.
Extract precisely the sentence relating to Fiktionswirkung or Fortgeltung if present.
Keep it as a temporary proof if needed, especially if the previous permit has expired.
Do not treat it as a new residence permit or final approval.
Use it only within the limits of what is actually written in it.
Watch whether the authority will later request additional documents or an appointment.
cat_auslaender_fiktionsbescheinigung_sum: This category concerns an official temporary certificate that formally evidences continued lawful status during application processing time. It is stronger than a simple receipt confirmation as it is usually a standalone, clearly defined document. Its importance increases significantly if the previous residence permit has expired or is about to expire.
cat_auslaender_fiktionsbescheinigung_ste: Classify as a standalone official temporary certificate.
Prepare passport or travel document substitute and previous permit if applying for its issuance.
Keep the certificate carefully after it is issued or received.
Do not confuse with the final approval decision or the eAT.
Read carefully the period it covers and the conditions stated in it.
Watch for later messages regarding the final decision or card.
cat_auslaender_fortgeltung_summary: This letter confirms that the current residence permit temporarily remains valid until a decision is made, provided the related application was submitted correctly or on time. It is neither a new permit nor a final approval but provides important temporary clarity. It is important to understand the limits of this continued validity: does it last until a later decision, are there conditions, and is it a text within a letter or a standalone document?
cat_auslaender_fortgeltung_step1: Keep the letter as an important temporary proof.
cat_auslaender_fortgeltung_step2: Read the wording of the continued validity carefully to understand its scope.
cat_auslaender_fortgeltung_step3: Do not treat it as a new residence permit or final decision.
cat_auslaender_fortgeltung_step4: Use it as temporary proof if needed and if doing so is logical.
cat_auslaender_fortgeltung_step5: Continue following up on the transaction until the final decision or document is received.
cat_auslaender_fortgeltung_step6: Continue following up on the transaction until the final decision is issued.
cat_auslaender_ablehnung_problemfall_sum: This is one of the most sensitive letters as it means there is a fundamental problem in the file or that the application is no longer proceeding normally. Sometimes the wording is explicit as a rejection; sometimes it is implied by phrases such as 'cannot be further processed', doubts, or 'conditions not met'. This category should not be classified as a normal information letter but as a high-priority case requiring careful line-by-line reading.
cat_auslaender_ablehnung_problemfall_ste: Read the reason for the problem or rejection word by word.
Determine whether the problem lies in the documents, legal conditions, or elsewhere.
Do not delay action as the impact on legal status or the file may be immediate.
Classify as an urgent or sensitive case.
If Ablehnungsbescheid appears clearly, move to the rejection category.
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_label: Rejection Decision Due to Unmet Requirements
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_summar: This letter means the problem is not just missing documents but that the conditions themselves are not met according to the authority's assessment. It is therefore a more serious rejection than a simple document request. The response here should not be 'I will send more documents' because the substance of the letter is different.
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_step1: Identify precisely which conditions the authority considers unmet.
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_step2: Do not treat the letter as a follow-up document request.
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_step3: Keep the complete decision with all pages and justifications.
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_step4: Extract any deadlines or hints for further steps mentioned in the decision.
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_step5: Classify as an explicit rejection of high priority.
cat_auslaender_ablehnungsbescheid_step6: Elevate the risk level for this category in the system.
cat_auslaender_uebertragung_summary: This transaction concerns not a new residence permit or renewal, but the transfer of an existing residence permit from an old passport to a new travel document. It is an administrative step but important to keep residence data linked to the correct document. Typical indicators are old passport / new passport / eAT / transfer.
cat_auslaender_uebertragung_step1: Classify as a passport transfer, not a renewal.
cat_auslaender_uebertragung_step2: Prepare the new and old passport if required.
cat_auslaender_uebertragung_step3: Attach the current residence card or its details if required.
cat_auslaender_uebertragung_step4: Prepare a current biometric photo if mentioned in the letter.
cat_auslaender_uebertragung_step5: Check the details of the new document carefully before submission or attendance.
cat_auslaender_uebertragung_step6: Note any additional condition related to the current residence permit itself.
cat_auslaender_gebuehrenhinweis_summary: This letter does not necessarily request new documents and usually does not assign an appointment but refers to fees associated with the transaction. Its significance is a financial obligation, not an administrative step. A common error is confusing it with final fees or a major administrative decision, while its main function is to inform about costs or payment.
cat_auslaender_gebuehrenhinweis_step2: Extract the fee amount and type of service if stated.
cat_auslaender_gebuehrenhinweis_step3: Keep the notice alongside the financial or administrative transaction file.
cat_auslaender_gebuehrenhinweis_step4: Note whether a specific payment method, location, or transaction-related payment date is given.
cat_auslaender_gebuehrenhinweis_step5: Do not confuse with an approval or rejection decision or a document request.
cat_auslaender_gebuehrenhinweis_step6: Review the Stand date as fees may change.
cat_auslaender_akteneinsicht_summary: This letter does not relate to a residence permit application, renewal, or personal appointment but to file access by a lawyer or authorised representative. It is closer to the 'legal file / archive' domain than to a 'residence transaction'. The presence of words such as Vollmacht, Rechtsanwalt, and Akteneinsicht helps greatly in preventing confusion with other categories.
cat_auslaender_akteneinsicht_step1: Classify as a legal or archival transaction related to the file.
cat_auslaender_akteneinsicht_step2: Check whether the letter requires a Vollmacht or formal representation.
cat_auslaender_akteneinsicht_step3: Do not present in the app as a new residence permit or renewal.
cat_auslaender_akteneinsicht_step4: Keep in a legal folder or a dedicated folder for representation and lawyers.
cat_auslaender_akteneinsicht_step5: Link to the person's legal file if there is other lawyer-related correspondence.
cat_auslaender_akteneinsicht_step6: Check whether the authorisation is general or limited to a specific purpose.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_summary: This form is an official application for sick pay (Krankengeld) from your health insurance company. It is used when you are unable to work due to illness for a period that generally exceeds 6 weeks, after your employer's continued salary payment (Entgeltfortzahlung) has ended. The health insurer then pays a wage replacement benefit.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step1: Fill in your employer's details and the exact start date of your incapacity to work.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step2: Answer all questions about pension, unemployment benefit, or other income if applicable.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step3: Attach your certificate of incapacity for work (Arbeitsunfähigkeitsbescheinigung) if it has not already been sent electronically.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step4: Submit the completed and signed form to your health insurance company.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step5: Follow up on the status of your application and make sure payments arrive on time.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_summar: This form is used to apply for long-term care services (Pflegeleistungen) from your care insurance (Pflegeversicherung). It covers an initial application for a care grade (Pflegegrad), upgrading an existing care level, or changing the type of care provided (e.g. from home care to residential care).
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step1: Specify the type of application: initial request (Erstantrag), upgrade (Höherstufung), or change of service type.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step2: Fill in the full details of the person requiring care.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step3: Indicate the type of care needed (home, financial, residential, or combination).
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step4: Prepare medical reports and arrange the assessment appointment (Begutachtungstermin).
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step5: Submit the completed form to your health insurer or the care branch (Pflegekasse).
cat_krankenkasse_beitragsbescheid_summar: This is an official contribution notice (Beitragsbescheid) from your health insurance company that sets the amount of your monthly contributions. It is usually sent to voluntarily insured members such as the self-employed, based on their income, and shows the monthly amount due for health and care insurance.
cat_krankenkasse_beitragsbescheid_step1: Review the calculated amount and verify it matches your actual income.
cat_krankenkasse_beitragsbescheid_step2: Compare the figures with your most recent income tax assessment (Einkommensteuerbescheid).
cat_krankenkasse_beitragsbescheid_step3: If there is an error or the amount seems too high, submit an objection (Widerspruch) within one month of receipt.
cat_krankenkasse_beitragsbescheid_step4: Update your bank account details (SEPA direct debit) if they have changed.
cat_krankenkasse_beitragsbescheid_step5: Keep this notice to include with your annual tax return.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_summary: This form is a membership application (Beitrittserklärung / Wahlerklärung) for a new statutory health insurance company. It is used when you wish to switch health insurer, start a new job, retire, or move from private to statutory health insurance.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step1: Fill in your personal details and your social insurance number (RV-Nummer).
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step2: State the reason for switching (job change, end of minimum membership period, increased additional contribution).
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step3: Enter the name of your previous health insurer and the period of coverage.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step4: Sign the form and send it to the new health insurance company.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step5: The new insurer will automatically notify your previous one.
cat_krankenkasse_familienversicherung_su: This form is used to add family members (spouse or children) to your health insurance free of charge under the family insurance scheme (Familienversicherung). It is usually required upon marriage, the birth of a new child, or when a family member loses their own insurance coverage.
cat_krankenkasse_familienversicherung_st: Fill in the details of the family member to be added (name, date of birth, relationship).
State the reason for the addition (marriage, birth, end of previous insurance).
Attach required documents (birth certificate, marriage certificate, proof of no independent income).
Sign the form and send it to the health insurance company.
Wait for confirmation of acceptance and the new insurance card for the family member.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_summary: This letter is an official notice to cancel your membership (Kündigung) with your current health insurance company. It is used when you wish to switch to another insurer, leave Germany, or move to private health insurance.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step1: Make sure your insurance number (Versichertennummer) is written correctly.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step2: Specify the desired cancellation date (usually the end of the month after next).
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step3: Request written confirmation of the cancellation (Kündigungsbestätigung) within 14 days.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step4: Keep a copy of the cancellation letter to submit to your new health insurer.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step5: Make sure you have valid alternative insurance in place before the cancellation date.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_summary: This form is used to apply for household assistance (Haushaltshilfe) from your health insurance company. It is used when you are unable to manage your household and care for your children due to serious illness, hospitalisation, pregnancy, or rehabilitation. The insurer will provide or reimburse the costs of a helper.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step1: Specify the period during which you need household assistance (from / to).
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step2: State who has been managing the household previously (you or your partner).
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step3: State your daily working hours to demonstrate your inability to manage the household.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step4: Attach a medical certificate or proof of hospitalisation.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step5: State whether there are children under 12 years of age in the household who need care.
cat_krankenkasse_versicherungsbescheinig: This is an official document confirming that you hold statutory health insurance (Versicherungsbescheinigung). It is typically required when enrolling at a university, starting a new job, or submitting proof of valid health insurance coverage to government or private bodies.
Verify that your personal details on the document are correct.
Confirm that the insurer's stamp and signature are present.
Submit the original to the requesting authority (university, employer, government body).
Keep a copy in your personal records.
Request a new certificate from the insurer if it has expired.
cat_krankenkasse_egk_summary: This form is used to request the issuance of an electronic health insurance card (eGK). Your insurer sends it when you first join, when your card expires, or when it is lost or damaged. You are required to attach a recent passport-sized photo.
cat_krankenkasse_egk_step1: Attach a recent passport photo (Passfoto) sized 35 × 45 mm in the designated space.
cat_krankenkasse_egk_step2: Make sure the photo meets passport photo standards (clear face, light background).
cat_krankenkasse_egk_step3: Sign the form in the designated area.
cat_krankenkasse_egk_step4: Send the form by post to the health insurance company.
cat_krankenkasse_egk_step5: Wait to receive the new card by post within 2–4 weeks.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_summary: This form is used to update your personal details with your health insurance company. It is used when you change address after moving, change your name after marriage or divorce, or update your phone number, email address, or bank account details.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step1: Write your old details clearly in the (Bisherige Daten) section.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step2: Enter your new details accurately in the (Neue Daten) section.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step3: Specify the date from which the change takes effect.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step4: Attach a copy of the supporting document proving the change (e.g. marriage certificate for name change, new rental agreement for address change).
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step5: Sign the form and send it to the health insurance company.
cat_insurance_police_summary: This document is your core insurance contract. It proves coverage exists, identifies the policyholder, describes the insured risk, and states when protection starts and ends. It is not a payment demand or dispute letter – it is the reference document you will consult for any future claim, amendment, or appeal.
cat_insurance_police_step1: File the document immediately in a dedicated insurance folder.
cat_insurance_police_step2: Verify that your name, address, and type of insurance are correct.
cat_insurance_police_step3: Note the Versicherungsschein-Nummer or Policennummer in a quick-access location.
cat_insurance_police_step4: Check the exact start and end dates of coverage.
cat_insurance_police_step5: Review the coverage amount and any Selbstbeteiligung (excess) stated.
cat_insurance_police_step6: Save a PDF copy alongside the original for fast future reference.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_summary: The insurer is requesting payment of a due premium. Unlike a general purchase invoice, this one is directly linked to the continuation of your coverage. Ignoring it can lead to a payment reminder (Mahnung) and ultimately put your protection at risk.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_step3: Check whether payment is collected automatically (SEPA direct debit) or must be made manually.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_step4: If paying manually, use the correct reference (Policennummer) for the transfer.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_step5: After payment, retain proof of transfer or confirm that the direct debit was successful.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_step6: Set a reminder before the next due date to avoid entering a Mahnung process.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_summary: The insurer has decided to compensate you or cover the costs following a claim review. This is generally a positive letter, but read it carefully – the settlement may be full or partial, and there may be a deductible (Selbstbeteiligung) or a direct payment to a third party.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_step1: Read the decision in full and determine whether the settlement is complete or partial.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_step3: Check whether a deductible or personal excess applies.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_step4: Confirm where the payment will be sent: to you or to a third party.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_step5: Compare the decision against the evidence and invoices you submitted.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_step6: If you notice a shortfall, raise a query or objection before closing the claim.
cat_insurance_beitragsanpassung_summary: The insurer has adjusted your premium – usually an increase. This is not a routine payment request; it is a decision that affects your future costs and may grant you a Sonderkündigungsrecht (special right of termination) if the premium rises without a matching expansion of cover.
cat_insurance_beitragsanpassung_step1: Compare the old and new premiums using the exact figures.
cat_insurance_beitragsanpassung_step2: Identify when the new rate takes effect.
cat_insurance_beitragsanpassung_step3: Read whether the reason is a general adjustment or a change linked to your contract data.
cat_insurance_beitragsanpassung_step5: Decide quickly whether the new rate is acceptable.
cat_insurance_beitragsanpassung_step6: If you wish to cancel, prepare the cancellation or comparison before the deadline expires.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_summary: This letter confirms that the insurer has received your claim report and opened a file. It is neither an approval nor a rejection – it is the start of the process. The most important element is usually the Schadennummer, which becomes the reference for all future communication.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_step1: Extract the Schadennummer and save it immediately.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_step2: Gather all documents relating to the claim in one place.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_step3: Check whether any additional documents have already been requested.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_step4: Do not send any further correspondence without quoting the Schadennummer.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_step5: Monitor your post or app, as the next response may require a prompt action.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_step6: Treat this letter as the start of the follow-up file, not the final result.
cat_insurance_vertragsverlaengerung_summ: The insurance contract will be renewed automatically if not cancelled within the notice period. This is not an immediate problem, but it has significant financial implications – ignoring it can automatically bind you to a new term.
cat_insurance_vertragsverlaengerung_step: Extract the end date of the current period.
Check the Kündigungsfrist (cancellation deadline) carefully – it is the most important detail.
Decide whether you still want this insurance.
Compare the current rate with alternatives if needed.
If you wish to cancel, do not wait until the last day.
Even if you decide to continue, keep the letter as proof of the new contract term.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_summary: The insurer has rejected the compensation or refused to cover the claim. This is one of the most critical letters in this folder – the outcome may mean you must bear the costs yourself. Understanding the exact reason for rejection is essential: contractual exclusion, missing documents, late notification, or a disputed factual account.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_step1: Read the full reason for rejection, not just the heading.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_step2: Determine whether the rejection is final or can be remedied by providing missing information.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_step3: Go back to the policy terms or the base document for comparison.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_step4: Collect all evidence, invoices, photos, and correspondence.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_step5: Note any deadline for appeal or response.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_step6: If the decision seems unjustified, prepare a clear and specific objection.
cat_insurance_mahnung_summary: This is a formal warning due to a missed insurance premium. It is more serious than a standard invoice because you have already entered a state of default. Following this, there is a risk of losing coverage or facing harsher measures than a simple payment request.
cat_insurance_mahnung_step1: Read the full outstanding amount, including any fees.
cat_insurance_mahnung_step4: Retain proof of transfer or confirm that the bank debit was successful.
cat_insurance_mahnung_step5: Confirm after payment that the arrears have been formally closed.
cat_insurance_mahnung_step6: If immediate payment is not possible, contact the insurer promptly rather than ignoring the letter.
cat_insurance_vertrag_nichtzahlung_summa: The insurer has terminated the contract due to non-payment. This is no longer just a financial delay – your coverage may have already ended or be about to end. This is one of the most sensitive documents in the folder.
cat_insurance_vertrag_nichtzahlung_step1: Identify the exact date from which coverage has ended.
cat_insurance_vertrag_nichtzahlung_step2: Do not assume you are still insured after receiving this letter.
cat_insurance_vertrag_nichtzahlung_step3: Contact the insurer immediately to explore whether a settlement or reinstatement is possible.
cat_insurance_vertrag_nichtzahlung_step5: If the contract cannot continue, start searching for an alternative promptly.
cat_insurance_vertrag_nichtzahlung_step6: Keep the letter as proof of the exact date the insurance relationship ended.
cat_insurance_kuendigungsbestaetigung_su: This letter formally confirms that your insurance contract will end on a specific date. It is not usually a dangerous letter, but it is a very important document because it is official proof that the cancellation was registered and that the contract will stop on the stated date.
cat_insurance_kuendigungsbestaetigung_st: Save the letter immediately in the cancellation or termination section.
Confirm that the date matches what you requested or agreed.
Monitor your bank account after that date.
If you need a replacement, do not leave a gap without insurance coverage.
Use this letter as proof in case of any future dispute.
cat_insurance_evb_summary: This letter contains the eVB number, which is required to complete a vehicle registration (Zulassung) or re-registration (Ummeldung). Without this number, official registration cannot be completed. It is not a risk letter, but it is a critical operational step at the start of a vehicle file.
cat_insurance_evb_step1: Extract the eVB number and save it somewhere clearly visible.
cat_insurance_evb_step2: Use it only when needed at the Zulassungsstelle.
cat_insurance_evb_step4: Confirm that the data linked to it matches your vehicle.
cat_insurance_evb_step5: Keep a note of the insurer's name associated with this number.
cat_insurance_evb_step6: After completing registration, store the letter as a reference in case of later errors.
cat_insurance_police_kfz_summary: This is the core document for your vehicle insurance. It officially proves that the vehicle is covered, specifies the type of cover (Haftpflicht / Teilkasko / Vollkasko), and includes vehicle and contract data. It is the primary reference for any accident, amendment, or dispute.
cat_insurance_police_kfz_step2: Confirm the type of coverage you chose.
cat_insurance_police_kfz_step4: Save the Versicherungsnummer and the insurer's name.
cat_insurance_police_kfz_step5: Review any Selbstbeteiligung or additional conditions.
cat_insurance_police_kfz_step6: Keep a clear digital copy for quick future access.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_kfz_sum: The vehicle insurer has agreed to settle the claim or pay costs related to the accident. This is an important financial decision letter – the payment may go to you, the repair workshop, or a third party.
cat_insurance_schadenregulierung_kfz_ste: Extract the compensation amount or the accepted coverage.
Confirm who will receive the payment.
Check whether a Selbstbeteiligung or deduction applies.
Compare the decision with the expert report or repair invoice.
Keep the letter together with all accident documents.
If you identify a shortfall, do not close the file before raising a query or objection.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_kfz_summa: This is the invoice for your vehicle insurance premium. It is different from other car-related invoices such as workshop or fuel bills, because it concerns the continuation of the insurance itself. A delay can lead to a Mahnung and then greater risks for the contract.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_kfz_step1: Read the final premium amount and confirm it relates to the correct vehicle.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_kfz_step3: Check whether payment will be collected automatically or must be made manually.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_kfz_step4: If paying manually, use the correct reference.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_kfz_step5: Keep proof of payment or confirm that the direct debit was successful.
cat_insurance_beitragsrechnung_kfz_step6: Do not confuse this with workshop or repair invoices.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_kfz_summary: This letter confirms that the vehicle accident report has reached the insurer and an official file has been opened. It is not a compensation decision or rejection – it is the start of processing. The most important element is the Schadennummer, which must be used in all subsequent correspondence.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_kfz_step1: Extract the Schadennummer and use it immediately as the filename.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_kfz_step2: Gather accident photos, police report, and the other party's details.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_kfz_step3: Read whether additional documents have been requested.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_kfz_step4: Do not send new correspondence without the file number.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_kfz_step5: Monitor your post regularly as the insurer may require a quick response.
cat_insurance_schadenmeldung_kfz_step6: Treat this letter as the start of the processing path, not the final result.
cat_insurance_vertragsaenderung_kfz_summ: This letter means that a change has been made to the vehicle insurance contract, such as an update to drivers, mileage, bank account, usage type, or tariff. It is very important because even a small error here can affect the premium or the insurer's position during a future claim.
cat_insurance_vertragsaenderung_kfz_step: Read every change listed in the letter line by line.
Confirm that the amendment matches the actual situation or what you requested.
Check whether the change affects the premium or coverage.
Correct any errors in the data immediately.
Keep the letter together with the original contract.
Do not leave incorrect information in place – it may harm you later.
cat_insurance_kilometerstand_summary: This letter asks you to report your current odometer reading. It is not a formality – it usually affects risk assessment and the premium. Provide the real figure as shown, not an approximation.
cat_insurance_kilometerstand_step1: Read the odometer directly from the vehicle.
cat_insurance_kilometerstand_step2: Record the number exactly without rounding.
cat_insurance_kilometerstand_step3: Submit it using the specified method.
cat_insurance_kilometerstand_step4: Keep a photo of the odometer or a screenshot as confirmation.
cat_insurance_kilometerstand_step5: Confirm that the submission was successful.
cat_insurance_kilometerstand_step6: Monitor whether the reading subsequently affects the premium or contract.
cat_insurance_sf_klasse_summary: This category concerns the SF-Klasse (no-claims bonus class), one of the most important factors affecting your vehicle insurance premium. The better the class, the lower the premium. A settled claim can trigger a Rückstufung (downgrading) that directly impacts the price.
cat_insurance_sf_klasse_step1: Extract your current class and record it clearly.
cat_insurance_sf_klasse_step2: Compare it with the previous class if older documents are available.
cat_insurance_sf_klasse_step3: Check whether a Rückstufung occurred due to a claim.
cat_insurance_sf_klasse_step4: Understand how the change affects the current or future premium.
cat_insurance_sf_klasse_step5: Keep this information for when you change insurer.
cat_insurance_sf_klasse_step6: If the classification appears incorrect, request a documented correction.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_kfz_summa: The vehicle insurer has refused to pay the compensation or cover the damage. This is one of the most critical letters in the vehicle file – the outcome may mean you bear the repair cost or liability yourself.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_kfz_step1: Read the full reason for rejection.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_kfz_step2: Gather all accident evidence and correspondence.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_kfz_step3: Go back to the insurance contract or terms for comparison.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_kfz_step4: Determine whether the rejection is complete or partial.
cat_insurance_schadenablehnung_kfz_step6: If you have strong grounds, prepare an objection supported by evidence.
cat_insurance_kuendigungsbestaetigung_kf: This letter confirms that your vehicle insurance will end on a specific date. It is not inherently dangerous, but it is highly sensitive because any error could leave the vehicle uninsured or result in ongoing debits despite the contract having been cancelled.
Save the letter immediately as official proof of insurance termination.
Confirm that the date matches what you requested or agreed.
If switching to another insurer, avoid any coverage gap.
Monitor your bank account after this date.
